question: Your company uses Windows-based shared drives in an on-prem data center (SMB shares integrated with Active Directory). You’re moving to a hybrid setup and need cloud file storage that remains compatible with Windows clients and supports typical Windows file server features so analytics workloads can keep reading/writing files the same way. Which AWS service is the best fit?

choices.B: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server

question: A security consultancy needs two capabilities in AWS: (1) detect potentially malicious behavior involving Amazon S3 data access, and (2) identify vulnerabilities on Amazon EC2 instances. Which solution best matches these needs?

choices.A: Use Amazon GuardDuty for S3 threat detection and use Amazon GuardDuty for EC2 vulnerability assessments
choices.B: Use Amazon Inspector for S3 threat detection and use Amazon GuardDuty for EC2 vulnerability assessments
choices.C: Use Amazon Inspector for S3 threat detection and use Amazon Inspector for EC2 vulnerability assessments
choices.D: Use Amazon GuardDuty for S3 threat detection and use Amazon Inspector for EC2 vulnerability assessments

question: A company uses separate AWS accounts for dev and prod. A group of developers in the dev account needs limited, auditable access to specific resources in the prod account without sharing long-term credentials. What should you do?

choices.A: Cross-account access is not supported in AWS
choices.B: Create an IAM role in the prod account with the required permissions and allow the dev users to assume that role
choices.C: Create IAM users in the prod account and share their access keys with the dev users
choices.D: IAM users and IAM roles are interchangeable for cross-account access

question: After an incident where a newly onboarded developer was granted overly broad permissions and accidentally deleted production DynamoDB tables, the company wants to prevent similar mistakes in the future. What is the MOST effective approach?

choices.A: Use IAM permissions boundaries to limit the maximum permissions that can be assigned to IAM principals
choices.B: Have the CTO manually review permissions for every new developer account
choices.C: Ensure only the root user has full database access
choices.D: Remove all full database access from every IAM user in the company

question: A company enabled AWS Shield Advanced in several separate AWS accounts and later noticed the total bill is much higher than expected. What is the most likely cause?

choices.A: They did not use consolidated billing, so the monthly Shield Advanced fee is charged separately per account instead of once for the organization
choices.B: They did not enable Savings Plans for Shield Advanced across all accounts
choices.C: Shield Advanced was applied to non-AWS (custom) servers, increasing costs
choices.D: Shield Advanced includes Shield Standard, causing double-charging
